component.name: EnvStation
component.summary: The missing Control Center for reproducible environments using Distrobox and Devcontainers.

description.p: EnvStation is a modern, fast, and intuitive manager for Distrobox containers. It acts as the intelligent bridge between your host system and your IDE, allowing you to visualize, create, and manage your development environments without touching the terminal.

ul.li: Unified Parity: Keep your native host terminal (Distrobox) and IDE (DevContainers) perfectly in sync.
Intelligent Drift Detection: Automatically detect manual terminal changes and adopt them into your manifest with one click.
EnvShare: Export and import environment manifests securely via GitHub Gists to share setups with your team.
Storage Management: Handle complex tasks like Podman GraphRoot relocation easily through the graphical interface.
Pre-configured Templates: Get started with Python, Node, Rust, Java, C++, and C# environments in under two minutes.
Distro-agnostic: Mix and manage Arch, Ubuntu, Fedora, and Alpine containers effortlessly.

description.p: Perfect for developers on immutable distributions like Bazzite, Fedora Silverblue, or SteamOS.
First stable release with Flatpak support and host communication.
